[30;1m22 | [0m[35mInternet client plug-in for files download and upload. Based on the InetLoad plug-in. [0m
[30;1m23 | [0m[35mNetwork implementation uses MS WinInet API, supports http/https and ftp protocols. [0m
[30;1m24 | [0m[35mPlugin has better proxy support compare to NSISdl plug-in. Command line may include [0m
[30;1m25 | [0m[35mfew URL/File pairs to be transfered. If server or proxy login/password are not setten in the script,[0m
[30;1m26 | [0m[35mdisplays IE-style authentication dialog (except silent mode). Plug-in supports 3 [0m
[30;1m27 | [0m[35m"transfer in progress" display modes: [0m

[30;1m21 | [0m[35m<h2>Description</h2>[0m
[30;1m22 | [0m[35mInternet client plug-in for files download and upload. Based on the InetLoad plug-in. [0m
[30;1m23 | [0m[35mNetwork implementation uses MS WinInet API, supports http/https and ftp protocols. [0m
[30;1m24 | [0m[35mPlugin has better proxy support compare to NSISdl plug-in. Command line may include [0m
[30;1m25 | [0m[35mfew URL/File pairs to be transfered. If server or proxy login/password are not setten in the script,[0m
[30;1m26 | [0m[35mdisplays IE-style authentication dialog (except silent mode). Plug-in supports 3 [0m
